pattern: A preorder walk emits the node before either subtree — visit root, then all of the left subtree, then all of the right.
hints: Record a node's value the moment you reach it, before looking at its children.
After the value, fully process the left subtree, then the right; the empty subtree contributes nothing.
Iteratively: push the root, and on each pop emit the value and push right then left so left is handled first.

edge_inputs.description: node, then right child with its own left child
right-skewed chain so the stack defers each right child correctly

stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
